response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video. Identified two distinct performances. 
2. Natsuiro Matsuri's performance: Text 'UNDEAD' and '夏色まつり' identified. Search query: '"UNDEAD" Natsuiro Matsuri Japanese and English lyrics'. 
3. Akai Haato's performance: Text 'RED HEART' and '赤井はあと' identified. Search query: '"RED HEART" Akai Haato Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. Compiled lyrics from search results into the scene structure. Note: 'RED HEART' has mixed English/Japanese lyrics, so the provided lyrics are the combined original lyrics.
response.global_summary: A two-song performance video featuring Natsuiro Matsuri singing 'UNDEAD' followed by Akai Haato singing 'RED HEART', both popular Hololive original songs.

scenes.description: Natsuiro Matsuri performs 'UNDEAD' in a virtual 3D environment. Text 'UNDEAD' and '夏色まつり' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アンハッピー？悩める子供達
アンラッキー？人間になれない
ビーハッピー！不貞腐れんな
アンデッド！生きてる
背を向けた過去も
変えられない未来も
今にあるんだ
生きてることは苦痛に果ててよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unhappy? If you're dealing with a lotta woes
Unlucky? Then you got to listen very close
Be happy Keep on trying, never give up
Undead, oh
Don't you ever let me go
You're alive
Even the past you turned away from
There's a future you can't change
It's just the way it is...

scenes.description: Akai Haato performs 'RED HEART' in a virtual 3D environment with backup dancers. Text 'RED HEART' and '赤井はあと' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
One, two, three, go!
Hi, how are you?
Are you calling up my phone?
Baby tell me what is wrong
Don't you ever let me go
Hi, I am good
I am still looking for proof
Am I good enough for you?
Don't you tell me what's my rule
This is me, are you coming?
My big RED HEART...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
One, two, three, go!
Hi, how are you?
Are you calling up my phone?
Baby tell me what is wrong
Don't you ever let me go
Hi, I am good
I am still looking for proof
Am I good enough for you?
Don't you tell me what's my rule
